title: Remove non-vegetarian dishes from recipe collection

requirements.text: Remove all non-vegetarian recipes from the hardcoded recipe list in backend/main.mo, including Butter Chicken, Chicken Biryani, and any other meat-based dishes
acceptanceCriteria: The recipe list contains only vegetarian dishes
All meat, poultry, fish, and seafood recipes are removed
The remaining recipes maintain their complete structure with name, description, cuisine type, difficulty, cooking time, ingredients, and video URL

requirements.text: Ensure the frontend recipe gallery and detail pages continue to display the filtered vegetarian-only recipe collection without any code changes
acceptanceCriteria: The recipe gallery displays only vegetarian recipes after backend update
Recipe filtering and search functionality works correctly with the reduced recipe set
No non-vegetarian dishes appear in search results or filtered views

constraints: Do not modify the Recipe type structure in backend/main.mo
Preserve all existing frontend filtering and search functionality
Maintain the existing Indian-inspired visual theme and layout
nonGoals: Adding new vegetarian recipes to replace removed ones
Changing the video URLs or recipe metadata structure
